bodyPreview: Rendered marketplace detail page confirms Promethease title, River Road Bio provider, free price, exact detail route, and literature-retrieval positioning. The page exposes rendered DOM/meta content rather than rich pageProps.reportData or a sample report file.
evidenceNotes: Marketplace detail page was opened in the in-app browser and resolved to the exact report URL.

This detail page exposes rendered DOM/meta content rather than the richer pageProps.reportData shape; use it for exact route availability, title, provider/price metadata, and detail-page boundary evidence only.
Use overview/marketing text only for report purpose and marketplace positioning, not for local genetic, medical, variant-classification, risk, treatment, or actionability conclusions.
No raw genome data, uploaded genome data, or account navigation text is included in this artifact.

meta.ogDescriptionPreview: Click to use Promethease for free to analyze your DNA data. Also includes access to DNA analysis apps and reports for health, genealogy, data exploration, and more.

source: in-app browser sequencing.com marketplace detail page rendered DOM/meta extraction
summaryPreview: Promethease is described as a literature retrieval system that builds a personal DNA report by connecting genotype files to scientific findings.
title: Promethease
visibleParagraphs: Promethease is a literature retrieval system that builds a personal DNA report based on connecting a file of DNA genotypes to the scientific findings.
Biomedical researchers, healthcare practitioners, and customers of DNA testing services such as 23andMe and AncestryDNA use Promethease to retrieve information published about their DNA variations.
The page links to Sequencing.com knowledge-center context for Promethease DNA analysis, but no official Promethease output table, SNPedia row set, or sample report file was exposed during capture.
